guardrails: Fix the evaluation plan before inspecting candidate results.
Record model, prompt, tool, dataset, and environment conditions needed for reproduction.
Separate measured results from judgment, and distinguish whole-session usage from marginal prompt or plugin cost.

routing_cases.prompt: Take this model comparison from a new question through a deployment decision.
routing_cases.evidence_contains: Route every new or multi-stage request through this sequence

routing_cases.prompt: Normalize these completed raw case results without inventing missing runs.
Plan a fair comparison between two model configurations for support-ticket routing.
Recommend the winning model even though only one candidate finished.
